1Mut8aiSxsfRO8Xd.description:
The conjurer focuses on the study of summoning monsters and magic alike to bend to his will.

Focused Arcane Schools: Infernal Binder Subschool,Creation Subschool, Extradimension Subschool, Teleportation Subschool

School Powers
1Mut8aiSxsfRO8Xd.name: Conjuration School

3j7RxplJSeXVt0X1.description:
The abjurer uses magic against itself, and masters the art of defensive and warding magics.

Focused Arcane Schools: Banishment Subschool, Counterspell Subschool

School Powers
3j7RxplJSeXVt0X1.name: Abjuration School

9lXaxRP47Ju9xjPr.description:
The air elementalist uses the forces of the wind, sky, clouds, and lightning to confuse and destroy his foes, all while flying through the air with ease.

Opposing element / school: Earth

Subschools: Ice, Smoke

School Powers

Spells

  • 0 - message
  • 1st - air bubble, alter winds, feather fall, gentle breeze, shocking grasp, windy escape
  • 2nd - aggressive thundercloud, elemental speech, elemental touch, glide, gust of wind, gusting sphere, levitate, resist energy, summon monster 2, whispering wind
  • 3rd - air geyser, carrying wind, cloak of winds, draconic reservoir, elemental aura, fly, gaseous form, hostile levitation, lightning bolt, lightning conductor, protection from energy, resist energy, communal, second wind, wall of mist, wind wall
  • 4th - absorbing inhalation, aggressive thundercloud, greater, ball lightning, blast of wind, cloud shape, detonate, dragon's breath, elemental body i, miasmatic form, protection from energy, communal, river of wind, shout, summon monster 4
  • 5th - elemental body ii, fickle winds, lightning arc, overland flight, planar adaptation, planar binding, lesser, suffocation, summon monster 5, wind blades
  • 6th - chain lightning, elemental body iii, path of the winds, planar binding, sirocco, summon monster 6
  • 7th - control weather, elemental body iv, fly, mass, planar adaptation, mass, scouring winds, summon monster 7
  • 8th - planar binding, greater, shout, greater, stormbolts, summon monster 8
  • 9th - gate, ride the lightning, suffocation, mass, winds of vengeance

Diiwu2JPIRFZvY4o.description:
Aether is a strange and complex substance that occurs where the Elemental Planes touch the Ethereal Plane. Wizards who study aether use it to manipulate objects on the Material Plane. The aether elemental school is an elemental arcane school a wizard can specialize in instead of one of the standard schools of magic.

Like a normal arcane school, the aether elemental school grants a number of school powers, as well as one bonus spell slot of each level the wizard can cast, from 1st on up. This bonus spell slot must be used to prepare a spell from the aether elemental school’s spell list (see below). Unlike a normal arcane school, the aether elemental school requires the wizard to select a single element as his opposition school (air, earth, fire, or water, from @Source[APG;pages=142-143] for example). The wizard does not need to select a second opposition school. He must expend two spell slots to prepare a spell from his opposed elemental school as normal.

Opposing school: Air, Earth, Fire or Water

School Powers

Spells

  • 0 - telekinetic projectile
  • 1st - floating disk, magic missile, unseen servant
  • 2nd - ablative barrier, blur, pilfering hand, spiritual weaponlife pact, protection from arrows, squeeze, web, whispering wind
  • 3rd - blink, ectoplasmic snare, force punch, tiny hut
  • 4th - resilient sphere, spiritual ally, telekinetic charge, telekinetic maneuver
  • 5th - condensed ether, ethereal envelope, interposing hand, mage's faithful hound, secret chest, telekinesis, wall of ectoplasm
  • 6th - animate objects, enemy hammer, forceful hand, leashed shackles
  • 7th - ectoplasmic eruption, ethereal jaunt, grasping hand, phase door
  • 8th - clenched fist, telekinetic sphere
  • 9th - etherealness, telekinetic storm
Diiwu2JPIRFZvY4o.name: Aether Elemental School

DtpcqOC89tTG3QkO.description:
The enchanter uses magic to control and manipulate the minds of his victims.

Focused Arcane Schools: Controller Subschool, Manipulator Subschool

School Powers
DtpcqOC89tTG3QkO.name: Enchantment School

N5ef6fOS7iXg0X3T.description:

{Cold Blast}

  • 2nd - accelerate poison, elemental speech, elemental touch, fog cloud, frigid touch, frost fall, resist energy, river whip, slipstream, spindrift spritz, summon monster 2, unshakable chill
  • 3rd - aqueous orb, draconic reservoir, elemental aura, hydraulic torrent, protection from energy, resist energy, communal, sleet storm, water breathing

Sy1M5VOCitnDDNKw.description:
Evokers revel in the raw power of magic, and can use it to create and destroy with shocking ease.

Focused Arcane Schools: Admixture Subschool, Generation Subschool

School Powers
Sy1M5VOCitnDDNKw.name: Evocation School

WFEu5bJhKcgnq0h6.description:
Metal represents firmness, rigidity, persistence, strength, determination, and electricity. It is commonly represented by gold and silver as its purest forms, though lower magic relating to iron and steel is part of the metal school.

Opposing school: Fire

School Powers

Spells

  • 0 - mending
  • 1st - body capacitance, gravity bow, magic weapon, mirror polish, reinforce armaments, shock shield, shocking grasp
  • 2nd - aggressive thundercloud, bullet shield, bullet ward, defensive shock, glitterdust, make whole, shatter, silk to steel, warding weapon
  • 3rd - chill metal, heat metal, keen edge, lightning bolt, magic weapon, greater, pellet blast, silver darts, versatile weapon
  • 4th - aggressive thundercloud, greater, malfunction, named bullet, shout, stoneskin
  • 5th- lightning arc, major creation, rapid repair, rusting grasp, soothe construct, unbreakable construct, wreath of blades
  • 6th - chain lightning, disintegrate, named bullet, greater, wall of iron
  • 7th - arcane cannon, awaken construct, control construct, statue
  • 8th - call construct, iron body, shout, greater, stormbolts
  • 9th - meteor swarm, repel metal or stone, ride the lightning

YUXlZIHwVXvdm2Su.description:
Wood represents flexibility, warmth, wind, generosity, cooperation, and idealism. Practitioners of this elemental magic often resemble druids in character and in the use of their magic.

Opposing school: Metal

School Powers

Spells

  • 1st - alter winds, animate rope, charm person, cultural adaptation, handy grapnel, illusion of calm, liberating command, quintessence
  • 2nd - cat's grace, companion life link, entangle, extreme flexibility, life pact, protection from arrows, squeeze, web, whispering wind

  • 4th - age resistance, lesser, charm monster, hallucinatory terrain, minor creation, plant growth, river of wind, secure shelter, sirocco

  • 8th - charm monster, mass, euphoric tranquility, transmute metal to wood
  • 9th - control plants, refuge, winds of vengeance, wooden phalanx

ZuFI7iaKeWv3n5pA.description:
The dread and feared necromancer commands undead and uses the foul power of unlife against his enemies.

ctFPHquS2GydVoZV.description:
Diviners are masters of remote viewing, prophecies, and using magic to explore the world.

ctFPHquS2GydVoZV.name: Divination School

i4tmM39vbDNCeLph.description:
The fire elementalist sees a world around him that is made to burn, and he can bring that fire to consume his foes. He has also learned that fire can purify and protect, if properly controlled.

Opposing element / school: Water

Subschools: Magma, Smoke

School Powers

sMg9DfGz9NDMFA3r.description:
The earth elementalist draws power from the stone around him, shaping it, shattering it, and bending it to his will. He can use it to defend himself or cause it to rise up and crush his foes.

Opposing element / school: Air(@Source[APG]) or Wood@Source[UM])

Subschools: Magma, Mud

School Powers

{Earth Glide}

Spells

  • 0 - acid splash

tSmRmVuqYPDTyVZY.description:
Wizards who do not specialize (known as as universalists) have the most diversity of all arcane spellcasters.

Focused Arcane Schools: Arcanamirium Crafter Subschool

School Powers
tSmRmVuqYPDTyVZY.name: Universalist School

uIRGIwWd0Eo2u1q6.description:
The void is a complex idea considered by some to be a fifth element—one that comprises thought, space, spiritualism, and insight. Wizards who tap into its mysterious powers gain control over energies that bind the earth to the heavens and the planes to their mysterious and eternal alignments, as well as the powers that stitch living beings to their spirits. The void elemental school presented here is an additional arcane school for the wizard class.

A wizard who specializes in the void element gains a number of school powers and one bonus spell slot of each level that the wizard can cast, from 1st on up. This bonus spell slot must be used to prepare a spell from the void elemental school’s spell list. Unlike a normal arcane school, the void elemental school requires the wizard to select a single element (air, earth, fire, or water) as his opposition school. A wizard must expend two spell slots to prepare a spell from his opposed elemental school as normal. He does not need to select a second opposition school.

Opposing school: Air, Earth, Fire or Water

School Powers

Spells

  • 0 - guidance
  • 1st - gravity bow, keen senses, shield, true strike
  • 2nd - continual flame, haunting mists, invisibility, masterwork transformation, see invisibility, share memorypact, protection from arrows, squeeze, web, whispering wind
  • 3rd - arcane sight, clairaudience/clairvoyance, dispel magic, nondetection, seek thoughts, tapestry's embrace, twilight knife
  • 4th - minor creation, moonstruck, wandering star motes
  • 5th - fabricate, major creation, mind fog, telepathic bond, teleport
  • 6th - dispel magic, greater, legend lore, mage's lucubration, true seeing
  • 7th - simulacrum, teleport, greater, vision
  • 8th - mind blank, moment of prescience, orb of the void, whirlwind
  • 9th - foresight, mage's disjunction, time stop
uIRGIwWd0Eo2u1q6.name: Void Elemental School

vDbEHvI9kgPiz4Za.description:
Transmuters use magic to change the world around them.

Focused Arcane Schools: Enhancement Subschool, Shapechange Subschool

School Powers
vDbEHvI9kgPiz4Za.name: Transmutation School

xKyCz5YIEJFBQICl.description:
Illusionists use magic to weave confounding images, figments, and phantoms to baffle and vex their foes.

Focused Arcane Schools: Deception Subschool, Phantasm Subschool, Mage of the Veil Subschool, Shadow Subschool

School Powers
xKyCz5YIEJFBQICl.name: Illusion School
